summary: Frontend-only validation for Hasanamba Car Decor static site. All 50+ UI assertions passed across desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (375x800). Sections render correctly: Header (sticky + 5 nav links + tel link), Hero (headline/image/CTAs/3 stats), Services (4 cards), Portfolio (5 items), Testimonials (3), About (3 principles + promise + CTA), Contact (phone +91 97419 08073 as tel: link, Thanniruhalla Hassan address, Mon-Sat & Sunday hours, email, Instagram/Facebook), Footer. No contact form present (forms=0, inputs=0) as required. Smooth anchor scroll works, sticky header gains backdrop-blur on scroll, mobile hamburger opens menu with all links + call button, no horizontal scroll on mobile, zero broken images, zero console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Social links in Contact.jsx use href='#' placeholders for Instagram/Facebook — replace with real profile URLs before launch.
Email hello@hasanambacardecor.com and domain hasanambacardecor.com are likely placeholders; confirm the business email is reachable.

Portfolio images reuse the same Unsplash audio/lighting URLs as Services (p2 audio image == service-audio image; p5 lighting image == service-lighting image) — consider varying imagery for better visual showcase.
Hours testid uses an em-dash 'hours-mon-—-sat' which is fragile; consider 'hours-mon-sat' for cleaner selectors.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static marketing site, no backend. All data-testid attributes present and reliable. Use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL root for testing. No login or forms exist. Phone tel: links and #anchor nav verified working.
